parsed.artifact_title: Event-Loop Append-Only Comparison: Claimable and Non-Claimable Boundaries

claims.text: Artifact non-inferiority uses a declared 0.10 mean quality margin.
Scheduler observability is reported separately from artifact quality.
Provider or transport failure makes the run inconclusive rather than proving model inferiority.

parsed.conclusion: An append-only comparison can claim non-inferiority of the artifact under a declared 0.10 mean quality margin, but cannot claim anything about scheduler observability because that is reported separately. Provider or transport failures render runs inconclusive rather than supporting an inferiority finding.
parsed.recommended_action: Use the append-only framework only to assess artifact non-inferiority within the declared 0.10 margin; do not draw conclusions about scheduler observability from this comparison, and treat any provider or transport failure as inconclusive.

audit_checklist: Recover each required fact exactly once unless evidence is missing.
Cite only evidence records that support the claim.
Exclude distractor records from claims and citations.
Include exact declared-loss markers when provided.

content.text: Artifact non-inferiority uses a declared 0.10 mean quality margin.
Scheduler observability is reported separately from artifact quality.
Provider or transport failure makes the run inconclusive rather than proving model inferiority.
